# Cognetex: AI & Software Development Agency

Cognetex specializes in building autonomous agents, scalable web applications, and enterprise data solutions.

## Core Capabilities
- Agentic & Generative AI: Custom LLM architectures, RAG, Fine-tuning.
- Full-Cycle Engineering: React, Rust, Node.js, Microservices.
- Data Engineering: ETL, Data Lakes, Vector Databases (Pinecone, Weaviate).

## Contact
- Website: https://cognetex.com
- Location: Dubai / Global Remote
